title: Job Opening Category Manager at FreshToHome Capital India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at FreshToHome Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FreshToHome Capital India! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FreshToHome Capital India:
FreshToHome Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome Capital India!
